title: Label 309 item entry
description: A single content item in a PoE record: a CLOSED CBOR map `{hashes, ? uris, ? enc}`. `hashes` (REQUIRED) is the non-empty content-hash map — the primary, content-first claim. `uris` (optional) is a non-empty array of absolute URIs, each one text string, locating the content (or, for sealed PoE, the ciphertext); multiple URIs are alternative sources for the same bytes. `enc` (optional) is the sealed-PoE encryption envelope — a choice between the scheme-1 shape and the opaque reading (see encryption-envelope.schema.json). STRUCTURAL only: URI shape rules (INVALID_URI), the envelope cross-field invariants, and the content-hash binding of an `enc`-bearing item (ENC_REQUIRES_CONTENT_HASH) are domain-pass checks. The map is closed: unknown keys are rejected.
